mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_account WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM user_account WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY user_id FOR UPDATE

SELECT ua.user_id, u.nickname, u.avatar, ua.points FROM user_account ua JOIN `user` u ON u.id = ua.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 AND u.status = 0 WHERE ua.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ua.points DESC, ua.user_id LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_account(user_id, balance_fen, points, frozen_points, version, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{balanceFen}, #{points}, #{frozenPoints}, #{version}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE user_account SET balance_fen = #{balanceFen}, points = #{points}, frozen_points = #{frozenPoints}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND version = #{version} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account_log(user_id, asset_type, change_type, change_value, before_value, after_value, biz_no, operator, remark, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{assetType}, #{changeType}, #{changeValue}, #{beforeValue}, #{afterValue}, #{bizNo}, #{operator}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT al.*, u.nickname, u.phone FROM account_log al LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = al.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE ORDER BY al.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM account_log al LEFT JOIN `user` u ON u.id = al.user_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE
